forbidden: modify any predecessor or successor artifact byte
delete or rewrite predecessor authority or locks
close RB-1, RB-4, RB-5, RB-6, or RB-7
expand user-built wheel postprocessing into the product contract
purpose: Make the accepted successor r3 legal family the canonical RB-3 family, retain the predecessor family as immutable historical authority, and close RB-3 without changing artifact bytes or implying RB-1 closure, selectability, or publication.
required_actions: verify all accepted successor and predecessor authority hashes
freeze an explicit supersession map from predecessor release identity to successor release identity
retain predecessor authority and locks byte-identically as historical valid evidence
mark successor r3 as canonical for RB-3 consumer compatibility
close RB-3 only; keep RB-1 owner approval and RB-4 through RB-7 open
